creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: I worry that an option will just confuse users a bit more.  What we do right now for the base openssl is we only enable /dev/crypto in 13.0 and later and don't hook it uptimes to the build at all in 12.x.  Having the port disable the engine on < 13.0 would match the behavior in /usr/src.  I wouldn't be opposed to an option so long as the option wasn't even available on < 13.
